alt_text: Sprinter in the drive phase out of the blocks with a 45 degree shin angle and forward lean
description: Acceleration drive-phase checkpoints I cue with my Crestwood sprinters: positive shin angle, piston arms, patient rise. #sprintmechanics #trackandfield #acceleration
title: Drive Phase Checkpoints for Young Sprinters

alt_text: Diagram of arm swing path from hip to chin showing relaxed hand and 90 degree elbow
description: Arm action is the metronome of the sprint. Hip to chin, relaxed hands, drive the elbow back. #sprinttechnique #armaction #speedtraining
title: Sprint Arm Action Cue Sheet

alt_text: Top-end sprinting form at full speed showing front-side mechanics and high knee recovery
description: Front-side mechanics at top-end speed: knee up, foot under the hip, ground contact directly beneath the center of mass. #topendspeed #maxvelocity #sprinting
title: Front-Side Mechanics at Max Velocity

alt_text: Weekly sprint training plan written on a whiteboard with sets reps and recovery times
description: An early-season speed week for high school 100m and 200m runners. Short accels, fly-ins, and full recovery. #trackworkouts #sprinttraining #highschooltrack
title: Early-Season Speed Week Template

alt_text: Runners on a track during a tempo session jogging the straights and walking the turns
description: Extensive tempo for recovery and aerobic base. Run the straights, walk the curves, keep it controlled. #tempotraining #trackandfield #conditioning
title: Tempo Running for Sprinters

alt_text: A brisket on an offset smoker with a deep mahogany bark and a meat thermometer probe
description: 12-hour brisket on the offset. Salt and pepper rub, post oak, wrapped at 165 and pulled at 203. Birmingham backyard low and slow. #brisket #bbq #offsetsmoker
title: 12-Hour Offset Smoker Brisket

alt_text: Pulled pork shoulder being shredded with bear claws next to a bottle of vinegar sauce
description: Pork butt smoked to 203, rested in the cooler, pulled and tossed with a thin vinegar sauce. Carolina meets the Magic City. #pulledpork #porkshoulder #bbq
title: Vinegar-Sauced Pulled Pork

alt_text: Meal prep containers with grilled chicken brown rice and roasted vegetables portioned out
description: Five-day high-protein prep around 40g per meal. Grilled chicken, brown rice, broccoli, sweet potato. Fuel for training weeks. #mealprep #macros #highprotein
title: Five-Day High-Protein Meal Prep

alt_text: Grocery cart full of chicken eggs greens and rice with a macro tracking app on a phone
description: My Sunday Publix list for a training-week prep. Lean protein, complex carbs, and greens, all macro-counted. #grocerylist #macros #mealprep
title: Sunday Publix Meal-Prep Grocery List

alt_text: A coach drawing a 4x100 relay exchange zone diagram on a whiteboard with arrows
description: 4x100 exchange zone planning: acceleration zone, go marks, and blind handoff timing for the Crestwood relay. #relay #4x100 #trackcoaching
title: 4x100 Relay Exchange Zone Plan

alt_text: A tray of smoked chicken wings with a side of white sauce at a Birmingham barbecue spot
description: Alabama white sauce on smoked wings, the way Big Bob Gibson started it. A Magic City must-eat. #birminghameats #alabamawhitesauce #bbq
title: Alabama White Sauce Smoked Wings

alt_text: A meat and three plate with fried catfish collard greens mac and cheese and cornbread
description: The classic Birmingham meat-and-three. Catfish, collards, mac, and a square of cornbread. Soul food done right. #meatandthree #soulfood #birmingham
title: Birmingham Meat-and-Three Plate

alt_text: A pair of sprint spikes on a red track next to a stopwatch and a set of starting blocks
description: Choosing the right sprint spike: plate stiffness, pin count, and fit for the 100 and 200. What I put my athletes in. #spikes #sprintspikes #runninggear
title: How to Choose Sprint Spikes

alt_text: Foam roller massage gun and compression boots laid out as a runner recovery kit
description: Recovery tools I keep in my bag: foam roller, massage gun, and compression boots. Manage load, stay healthy. #recovery #runninggear #sportsrecovery
title: Runner Recovery Kit Essentials

alt_text: A physical therapist guiding a single-leg eccentric hamstring exercise on a treatment table
description: Nordic curls and eccentric hamstring loading to bulletproof sprinters against pulls. From the clinic to the track. #hamstringrehab #sportspt #prehab
title: Eccentric Hamstring Loading Progression

alt_text: A return-to-run progression chart showing walk-run intervals building toward full sprinting
description: Return-to-run criteria and a staged progression after a soft-tissue injury. Build volume before intensity. #returntorun #sportsrehab #physicaltherapy
title: Staged Return-to-Run Protocol

alt_text: An athlete performing box jumps and bounding plyometrics in a weight room setting
description: Plyometric progressions for sprinters: pogos, bounds, and depth jumps for reactive strength and power. #plyometrics #sprinttraining #power
title: Plyometric Progressions for Sprinters

alt_text: A barbell loaded for a power clean with chalk and lifting shoes in a high school weight room
description: Teaching the power clean to teenage sprinters: triple extension, fast turnover, and rate of force development. #olympiclifting #strength #trackandfield
title: Coaching the Power Clean

alt_text: Hurdlers practicing trail-leg drills over a line of low hurdles on an outdoor track
description: Trail-leg and lead-leg drills for the 300m hurdles. Knee drive, flat trail leg, and a quick snap-down. #hurdles #hurdletechnique #trackandfield
title: 300m Hurdle Drill Series

alt_text: A flyer for a charity 5K run with a finish-line banner and runners in matching shirts
description: Lace up for the Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K on November 8. Proceeds support youth sports rehab in Birmingham. #charity5k #birmingham #running
title: Iron City Charity 5K — November 8
